sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n101258" key="suri/sdw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡρίσδω</orth>, <sense id="n101258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συρίζω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συρίσκος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σύρισσος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὑρισός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
